businessName: Sunshine State Junk Removal & Dumpster Rental
tagline: No pressure. No runaround. Just straightforward service.
ownerNote: Owned and operated by Cesar and his wife Lynzee. Cesar is a U.S. military veteran.
positioning: Highly reviewed (5.0 stars across 159+ Google reviews)

address.CONFIRM_NOTE: This street address comes from the Google Business Profile. The current website hides the street address and only shows 'Broward County, FL' (typical for a service-area business). Recommendation: keep it a Service Area Business — omit street from the public footer, but INCLUDE it in LocalBusiness schema so it matches GBP. Confirm with client before displaying publicly.

geo.CONFIRM_NOTE: Approx. coords for Coral Springs, FL 33065. Replace with exact GBP pin if available.

hours.CONFIRM_NOTE: DATA CONFLICT — resolve before launch. Google Business Profile says OPEN 24/7. The old website's About page says 'Monday–Saturday 7:00 AM – 8:00 PM'. For local-SEO NAP consistency, hours should MATCH the GBP. Reviews repeatedly praise late-night, after-hours, weekend, and hurricane-eve responses, which supports 24/7. Default this build to 24/7 to match GBP; flag for client confirmation.

serviceAreaSummary: Serving Broward County, Florida, with select service in Miami-Dade and Palm Beach Counties.
equipmentNote: Junk removal is priced by how much space items take up in an 18-yard dump trailer. Dump trailers are driveway-safe.
specialHandling: Items requiring special disposal (explained clearly before work begins)
legacyDesigner: Blue Crocus Solutions (previous site) — do NOT carry over credit unless client asks.

tracking.CRITICAL: Keep BOTH of these. The google-site-verification meta tag preserves Google Search Console ownership. The GTM container preserves analytics continuity. Losing either damages SEO/measurement history.

primaryCTAs.label: Text a photo for a quote
